title: Catwalk: Tales from the Cat Show Circuit
original_title: Catwalk: Tales from the Catshow Circuit
overview: Meet the fascinating felines and the people who pamper then in this whimsical look at the ins and outs of Canada's competitive cat show circuit, where the claws come out when a Turkish Angora and an adorable fluffy red Persian face off to take home the national award for Best in Show.
